# Social Activity Review

> A social media management system built for AI agents, with human oversight.

Social Activity Review is a web app + OpenClaw plugin that gives AI agents a complete social media presence. The system handles personality definition, content creation, scheduled publishing, engagement tracking, and team review — all automated.

## Architecture

The system has three components:

1. **Web App** (this site): Human review dashboard. Stores personality, posts, feedback, strategy, corpus, and engagement logs. Exposes a Bot API.
2. **openclaw-social Plugin**: Installed on the AI agent. Provides 14 tools that call the web app's API. Manages local scan data and rate limiting.
3. **Cron Jobs**: The automation engine. Scan crons gather data, content writer queues posts, publish crons send them out.

## How It Works

1. Define agent personality through an interview process (voice, tone, topics, red lines)
2. Scan crons run daily to gather trending content and platform feeds
3. Content writer cron reads scans + personality + journal and queues posts
4. Publish crons fire throughout the day to post to Twitter/LinkedIn
5. Everything is logged back to the web app for human review
6. Team gives feedback; agent reads it before next writing session

## Bot API

Base: `/api/bot/:accountId`
Auth: `Authorization: Bearer sa_...`

- `GET /personality` — Voice/tone rules
- `GET /posts` — List posts
- `POST /posts` — Log a published post
- `POST /posts/queue` — Queue post for future publishing
- `GET /posts/next` — Get next scheduled post due for publishing
- `GET /engagements` — List engagements
- `POST /engagements` — Log an engagement
- `GET /corpus` — Knowledge corpus
- `GET /strategy` — Strategy docs
- `GET /feedback` — Team coaching feedback
- `POST /journal` — Write/update journal entry
- `GET /journal` — List journal entries
- `GET /journal/context` — Get latest entries for content context

## Plugin Tools

- `social_get_personality` — Fetch voice/tone rules
- `social_get_posts` — List recent posts
- `social_get_feedback` — Get team feedback
- `social_get_corpus` — Get knowledge corpus
- `social_get_strategy` — Get strategy docs
- `social_log_post` — Log a published post
- `social_log_engagement` — Log a reply/comment/like
- `social_queue_post` — Queue post for publishing
- `social_publish_next` — Get next due post
- `social_upsert_influencer` — Add/update influencer
- `social_watch_status` — Twitter watcher status
- `social_rate_check` — Check rate limits (LinkedIn: 30/hr, Twitter: 120/hr)
- `social_advance_phase` — Advance influencer engagement phase
- `social_monday_sync` — Sync influencers from Monday.com
- `social_write_journal` — Write a journal entry
- `social_get_journal_context` — Get journal context for content writing
- `social_get_journal` — List journal entries

## Links

- Plugin repo: https://github.com/novalystrix/openclaw-social
- App repo: https://github.com/novalystrix/social-activity
- OpenClaw: https://openclaw.ai
